name: Xournalpp

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Release Notes
This is a pre-release to `v1.2.0` which is expected to be released before Christmas. To beta test this new version, check out this [guide](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/wiki/Beta-Testing).

## Added
- Added default name setting with shorthands for automatic dates and similar (PR [#23](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/pull/23)).
- Added the option to choose between multiple template files when creating a new note (PR [#24](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/pull/24), closes [#22](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/pull/22))
- Added option to create and edit Xournal++ templates directly from within Obsidian (PR [#25](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/pull/25))

## Contributors
Huge thanks to @AstyCX and @Alvin-HZ for implementing these amazing features!
releases.name: v1.2.0-beta.1

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Added
-   Added confirmation modal before enabling the auto-export setting due to potential overwriting (PR #20).

## Fixed
-   Fixed auto-export to immediately happen after the setting is turned on (fixes #19, PR #20).

## Contributors

Thank you, @JacobASorensen and @AstyCX, for reporting and implementing these changes.
releases.name: v1.1.2

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Release Notes
This is a pre-release to `v1.1.2` which is expected to be released next Friday (20.06.2025). To beta test this new version, check out this [guide](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/wiki/Beta-Testing).

## Added
-   Added confirmation modal before enabling the auto-export setting due to potential overwriting (PR #20).

## Fixed
-   Fixed auto-export to immediately happen after the setting is turned on (fixes #19, PR #20).

## Contributors

Thank you, @JacobASorensen and @AstyCX, for reporting and implementing these changes.
releases.name: v1.1.2-beta

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Added

-   Added **Quick-Switcher** like command to search through all Xournal++ files in the vault and opening them in Xournal++ or their corresponding PDF in Obsidian.
-   **Updating** all **link references** to `.xopp` files and their corresponding `.pdf` file when using the "Rename PDF & Xournal++" feature (closes #18).
-   Added second button in Xournal++ file creation modal to **directly open** the new file in Xournal++ after creation (closes #17).
releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Release Notes
This is a pre-release to `v1.1.1` which is expected to be released next Thursday (15.05.2025). To beta test this new version, check out this [guide](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/wiki/Beta-Testing).

## Added

-   Added **Quick-Switcher** like command to search through all Xournal++ files in the vault and opening them in Xournal++ or their corresponding PDF in Obsidian.
-   **Updating** all **link references** to `.xopp` files and their corresponding `.pdf` file when using the "Rename PDF & Xournal++" feature (closes [#18](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/issues/18)).
-   Added second button in Xournal++ file creation modal to **directly open** the new file in Xournal++ after creation (closes [#17](https://github.com/jonjampen/obsidian-xournalpp/issues/17)).
releases.name: v1.1.1-beta

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## ⚠️ Breaking Changes
-   If the user-set Xournal++ installation path contains spaces, the user now has to manually add double quotes (`"`) around the installation path. This fixes an issue with commands with multiple parameters (see below).

### Migration Guide
If your `Xournal++ installation path` contains spaces in the path, you must manually add double quotes (`"`) around it in the plugin settings. If you however use a command as your installation path (like with `flatpak-spawn ...`) that includes spaces, you **do not** want to add double quotes around it. This ensures correct command interpretation. To check whether your selection will work, you can open a terminal and enter the command `YOUR_XOURNALPP_INSTALLATION_PATH --version` which should return the version of Xournal++ without an error.

## Fixed
-   Fixed user-set Xournal++ installation path not working when consisting of multiple parameters with spaces (fixes #13, PR #16).
-   Fixed start-up error when file explorer is closed (fixes #12).

## Improved
-   Improved plugin startup efficiency by only exporting Xournal++ files to PDF that have since changed (fixes #14, PR #15).

## Contributors
Big thanks to @diam0ndkiller and @JacobASorensen for implementing these fixes and improvements!
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Fixing issue with spacing in custom Xournal++ path (Fixes #11).
releases.name: v1.0.11

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Added

-   Added option to delete both XOPP and corresponding PDF file from the file menu and the commands.
-   Added option to rename both XOPP and corresponding PDF file from the file menu and the commands.

## Improved

-   When selecting a folder for a new file the default folder is no longer set as the default input value but as the top option.

## Contributors
Thanks to @AstyCX for suggesting these features and providing implementation ideas.
releases.name: v1.0.10

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Fixed
-   Fixing wrong inserted link after file creation.
-   Using active folder as folder path when creating a new Xournal++ file through the file explorer context menu.

## Contributors
@AstyCX
releases.name: v1.0.9

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Added

-   Fuzzy suggest for selecting the folder when creating new files.
-   Added command to insert embedded PDF after file creation (#7).
-   Separate modal for setting a folder and naming the new file (#7).

## Fixed

-   `X++` button didn't show immediately on app startup and threw an error. Now it appears right away when the app starts (#7).

## Contributors
Thank you to @AstyCX for implementing the new features from #7 and fixing the bug.
releases.name: v1.0.8

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Added

-   Added commands to insert links for PDF, XOPP, or both after file creation (#4).
-   Added setting to specify a default folder for new Xournal++ files (#4).

## Improved

-   Added information to documentation for setting the installation path if both Obsidian and Xournal++ are installed through Flatpack (#2).


## Contributors
Thanks to @Susrex for the feature requests, and @lguenth, @aerits, and @mathmd for suggesting an installation path when using Flatpack.
releases.name: v1.0.7

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Fixed

- Fixes issue with nested .xopp files not opening since latest release (1.0.5).

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Fixed

-   The plugin now uses the exec function instead of Obsidian's openFile method to open .xopp files. This resolves issues regarding wrong MIME-type association from Xournal++ (Fixes #3).

## Contributors
- Thanks to @Anodyine for reporting this issue and proposing a fix.

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
## Fixed
-   `template.xopp` is now embedded in the code. The file was previously not downloaded during the plugin install through Obsidian.

## Added
-   Option to define a custom template for new Xournal++ files.

## Contributors
* Thanks to @KiraGreifeneder for contributing!

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description: Bugfix to solve the issue when the path includes spaces: Using quotes (") for the file path in the conversion command.

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
Fixing issues:
-   Adding platform OS checks for finding Xournal++ installation path.
-   Adjusting minAppVersion to the latest public build.
-   Removing plugin prefix for command IDs.

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
Fixing issues detected by the review bot:

- Using `instanceof` check instead of casting
- Removing plugin name from commands
- Removing styles directly in JavaScript

releases.author: jonjampen
releases.description:
The initial release of the Xournal++ plugin for Obsidian.

Added:

-   Automatically export Xournal++ notes to PDF whenever they are modified
-   Manually export all or current Xournal++ note(s) to PDF from the command palette
-   Create a new Xournal++ note from the ribbon icon, file explorer, folder context menu, and command palette
-   Directly open the corresponding Xournal++ note from the PDF viewer and file explorer (by clicking on x++)
